name: Ambassador Restaurant

notes: All 19 frozen rows were adjudicated: seven exact current first-party favorites and 12 page-chrome, marketing, rating, hours, or location artifacts.

The current asserted catalog contains 26 formulations across 27 presentations: seven first-party guest favorites, with Chicken overlapping a 20-row restaurant-linked delivery catalog; 19 current formulations were omitted from the frozen record.

The linked Uber channel closed May 5, 2026. Its 20-row catalog is retained only because the same restaurant-matched catalog is preserved in menu imagery on a page updated in May 2026 and substantially corroborated by the longer third-party catalog; unique uncorroborated legacy rows were excluded.
No restaurant-issued allergen guide, matrix, complete ingredient list, or cross-contact statement was located; all 26 item allergenSourceType values remain unavailable.
Ten items have explicit non-official Ingredient Intelligence cues from reviewed menu wording. These are not official contains claims and do not create negative assurances for other allergens.

Kitcha Fitfit carries milk and gluten inference from butter and barley bread, but no false wheat inference; Chicken Tibsi carries no ingredient inference because its delivery description is internally corrupted.

Reviewed restaurant identity, first-party menu scope, restaurant-linked vendor status, current third-party menu imagery, longer catalog corroboration, every frozen artifact, item wording, inference authority, and final generated fields.
Nine focused tests pass; seven captured artifact hashes match; all 19 item evidence ids resolve; and the generated target exactly matches the 26-item reviewed snapshot.

The target-only repair is idempotent at SHA-256 ef53e98491ece3456b6c0e62a1dec12f51d367b20aed0aab52c5b6e892d73327 and preserved all 1,494 non-target restaurants at SHA-256 4851b673c4be2f81bec118d650dfdd4cedadadb4d4c9ec8576096d0564807fc5.

sourceAttempts.outcome: captured current first-party seven-row guest-favorites page; no allergen disclosure
ledger fetch returned HTTP 403; browser-readable page was reviewed and recorded separately
notes: The page identifies the exact address and says the channel closed May 5, 2026.

sourceAttempts.outcome: ledger fetch returned HTTP 403; browser exposed the current store shell but no item rows
captured current identity page and two menu composite images; visually reviewed at original resolution
captured longer corroborative catalog with explicit currency disclaimer
notes: Unique uncorroborated rows are not treated as current.

sourceAttempts.outcome: no restaurant-issued allergen guide, matrix, ingredient list, or cross-contact statement located

findings.summary: The frozen 19-row crawl contained 12 page-chrome or marketing artifacts, represented only seven real menu rows, and omitted 19 current formulations.
findings.resolution: Replaced the crawl with 26 current formulations across 27 presentations and removed all 12 non-menu rows.

findings.summary: The first-party site exposes only seven generic favorites, the restaurant-linked Uber channel closed May 5, 2026, and current menu imagery is third-party; none alone establishes the complete current catalog.
findings.resolution: Used the 20-row delivery catalog only where the exact identity, current imagery, current store shell, and longer catalog corroborate it; excluded unique uncorroborated legacy rows and recorded all authority and freshness warnings.

findings.summary: No restaurant-issued item-level allergen, ingredient, or cross-contact disclosure was found for any current formulation.
findings.resolution: Marked all 26 formulations officially unavailable and retained explicit reviewed wording only as separately labeled Ingredient Intelligence.

findings.summary: The restaurant-linked Chicken Tibsi description incorrectly says fresh lamb strips of tender beef, so using it for ingredient extraction would misstate the formulation.
findings.resolution: Retained the current Chicken Tibsi item identity but excluded the corrupt protein wording from ingredient and allergen inference.

findings.summary: Generic inference maps barley bread to wheat even though barley supports gluten but is not wheat.
findings.resolution: Stored explicit milk and gluten Ingredient Intelligence for Kitcha Fitfit and suppressed the unsupported wheat signal.

findings.summary: The frozen record did not carry the full current street address.
findings.resolution: Set the display address to 1907 9th St NW, Washington, DC 20001 and the guide to the current first-party menu page.

repairs.summary: Replaced 19 mostly non-menu crawl rows with 26 current formulations across 27 source presentations; removed 12 page artifacts, restored 19 omitted formulations, kept restaurant allergen data unavailable, and represented explicit non-official wording only as Ingredient Intelligence.

notes: Current address: 1907 9th St NW, Washington, DC 20001.
The current first-party menu page lists Espresso, Ethiopian Stew, Chicken, Beets, Spinach, Lettuce, and Cabbage without item descriptions or allergen disclosures.
No safe dedicated audit worktree exists because the checkout remains dirty, so no checkpoint commit was created.
